center.name: 河岛
center.summary: 河岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Orange-headed tanager，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Venezuela and the western Amazon, it inhabits successional vegetation like tall Gynerium grasses, willows, Tessaria and Cecropia shrubbery, and young secondary growth near rivers and on river islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Venezuela and the western Amazon, it inhabits successional vegetation like tall Gynerium grasses, willows, Tessaria and Cecropia shrubbery, and young secondary growth near rivers and on river islands
